title: RocksDB Options Structure
description: Hierarchical structure documentation for RocksDB database configuration, organized by configuration category.

DBOptions.description: Database-level options affecting the entire RocksDB instance

fields.create_if_missing: boolean - Create database if it does not exist
fields.error_if_exists: boolean - Raise error if database already exists
fields.paranoid_checks: boolean - Enable aggressive data integrity checking
fields.max_open_files: integer - Maximum number of open file descriptors (-1 = unlimited)
fields.max_background_jobs: integer - Maximum concurrent compaction and flush threads
fields.max_total_wal_size: integer - Maximum total size of WAL files in bytes
fields.db_log_dir: string - Directory for INFO log files
fields.wal_dir: string - Separate directory for WAL (Write Ahead Log) files
fields.delete_obsolete_files_period_micros: integer - Period for deleting obsolete files in microseconds
fields.stats_dump_period_sec: integer - Period to dump statistics to log in seconds
fields.enable_pipelined_write: boolean - Enable pipelined writes for higher throughput

ColumnFamilyOptions.description: Per-column-family options for storage, compaction, and memory

fields.write_buffer_size: integer - MemTable size in bytes before flush
fields.max_write_buffer_number: integer - Maximum number of MemTables before flush
fields.min_write_buffer_number_to_merge: integer - Minimum MemTables to merge before flush
fields.compression: string - Compression algorithm (snappy, zlib, lz4, zstd, etc.)
fields.target_file_size_base: integer - Target SST file size at level 1 in bytes
fields.max_bytes_for_level_base: integer - Maximum data size at level 1 in bytes
fields.level0_file_num_compaction_trigger: integer - Files at L0 to trigger compaction
fields.bloom_filter_bits_per_key: integer - Bits per key for bloom filter (reduces reads)
fields.ttl: integer - Seconds before keys expire (0 = disabled)
fields.enable_blob_files: boolean - Store large values in separate blob files
fields.min_blob_size: integer - Value size threshold for blob file storage

fields.verify_checksums: boolean - Verify block checksums on read
fields.fill_cache: boolean - Populate block cache on read
fields.snapshot: object - Snapshot to read from for consistent reads
fields.prefix_same_as_start: boolean - Stop iterator when prefix changes
fields.readahead_size: integer - Readahead size for sequential scans in bytes

WriteOptions.description: Options for write operations (Put, Delete, Merge)

fields.sync: boolean - Sync WAL before acknowledging write
fields.disableWAL: boolean - Skip WAL for this write (fast but not crash-safe)
fields.ignore_missing_column_families: boolean - Silently ignore writes to unknown column families
fields.no_slowdown: boolean - Return error instead of sleeping during write throttling
fields.low_pri: boolean - Write at low priority (for background bulk loads)
